title: Cannot revoke object access
poc: create table u1(c1 int, c2 int);
key_bug_features: Revoking SELECT access on created table fails
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE u1(c1 INT, c2 INT, c3 VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'default');
INSERT INTO u1(c1, c2) VALUES (1, 2), (NULL, 3), (4, NULL);
GRANT SELECT ON u1 TO user2;
SELECT * FROM u1 WHERE c1 IS NULL OR c2 > 1;
REVOKE SELECT ON u1 FROM user2;
